rulings.Case Title: MAXYGEN INC VS. ENCHIRA BIOTECHNOLOGY CORP
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION (Notice Of Rescheduled Hearing)To Determine Whether Records Should Be Sealed
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO SEAL AS TO LICENSING AGREEMENT, THE DECISION, THE PATENT NUMBERS IN THE AWARD, AND THE EXHIBITS ATTACHED TO THE AWARD. GRANT MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. DENY MOTION TO STAY/DISMISS. (PB)
